NOTICE OF MOTION FOR MANDATORY DISMISSAL, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY RESPONDENT RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HEARING SET FOR APR-03-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: RESPONDENT RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR MANDATORY DISMISSAL IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
